message:
Fix TestLocalClusterManager to expect vcluster as 4th tool (#2950)

DetectTools() was updated in PR #2915 to also detect vcluster, but the
test was not updated to account for the new tool. The mock lookPath
returns success for all binaries, so detectVCluster() finds it and
returns 4 tools instead of the hardcoded expectation of 3.

- Add vcluster version mock to execCommand
- Update expected tool count from 3 to 4 using a named constant

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
